name: A2
description:
YoRHa Type A No.2, or just A2, is one of the protagonists of NieR:Automata, as well as the final boss in Branch D. She is also a major character in the YoRHa Stage Play.
She is a prototype of the YoRHa android line, and combat data from her and her comrades were used to create the superior current lines.
creator: Kostia
